name: subscribeWebSocket
description: Opens a WebSocket connection and writes parsed messages to the specified data model path. Enables bidirectional real-time communication for live-updating surfaces.

url.description: The WebSocket endpoint URL to connect to (ws:// or wss://).

targetPath.description: The JSON pointer path in the data model where each parsed message will be written.

messageParser.description: An optional parser identifier for incoming messages (e.g., 'json'). If omitted, messages are written as raw strings.
